name: Amy Pattillo Campaign
resolved_employer: Candidate/campaign committee of Amy Pattillo; Pattillo is COO of AvecMode LLC, a former local elected official in Travis County, and serves on the CAMPO Transportation Policy Board and the Precinct 3 Citizens Bond Advisory Committee
evidence: This donor is a political campaign committee (not an individual), which redistributed funds to Travis County Commissioners Jeff Travillion, Ann Howard and Margaret Gomez in Nov 2021. Travis County records identify Amy Pattillo as COO of AvecMode LLC, a ~19-year business owner across legal/humanitarian/high-tech/event/transportation sectors, a former Travis County local elected official, and current CAMPO Transportation Policy Board member.

name: Ranus, Karen
resolved_employer: NAMI Central Texas (National Alliance on Mental Illness) — Executive Director; mental-health advocate/strategist
evidence: Austin 78729 donor to Kirk Watson (76 FEC gifts, fully Democratic lean). Karen Ranus is a well-documented Austin public figure: first Executive Director of NAMI Austin/NAMI Central Texas (from 2014), trauma-informed mental-health strategist, and member of the Travis County Behavioral Health Advisory Committee and Mayor's Health and Fitness Council board — squarely nonprofit/health advocacy.
